changes.description: ProductTile override — wraps base tile with hover-triggered Quick View button
QuickViewModal component — Chakra modal with ProductView, variant selection, and add-to-cart
Unit tests for QuickViewModal — rendering, open/close, product loading states
Added QUICK_VIEW_TEST_IDS, QUICK_VIEW_CONFIG, and QUICK_VIEW_MESSAGES constants
isQuickViewEligible() utility — checks product type, availability, and variant count
Unit tests for isQuickViewEligible — 12 tests covering eligibility edge cases
Added Quick View i18n message strings (en-US compiled translations)
Added Quick View i18n message strings (en-GB compiled translations)
Added Quick View pseudo-locale translations (en-XA for testing)
Added Quick View source message definitions (en-US)
Added Quick View source message definitions (en-GB)
Playwright E2E tests — 5 scenarios: hover button, modal open, variant+cart, close, no-navigate

knownIssues.description: E2E tests timed out due to page.waitForLoadState('networkidle') never resolving — PWA Kit HMR WebSocket keeps connection active. Fix: replace 'networkidle' with 'domcontentloaded' in E2E helpers.
QuickViewModal import in product-tile used @salesforce/retail-react-app alias instead of relative path for a new custom component, causing webpack ModuleNotFoundError. Fixed in redevelopment cycle 1.
